title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.701 - Definitions
text:
65.701.  Definitions. — As used in sections 65.652 and 65.690, the term "freeholder" or the phrase "resident freeholder" shall be defined to mean "resident".  The provisions of this section shall have no effect on pending litigation.
(L. 1996 H.B. 1207 § 1) 
Effective 6-25-96
